subUnits.title: 4.1 Mineral Resources and Agriculture in FCT
notes: FCT is endowed with various mineral resources that contribute to economic development:
- Found in Kwali and Gwagwalada areas
- Abundant in Kwali, Kuje, and Bwari
- Used for construction and road building
- Found in Abaji and Kuje areas
- Used in ceramics and glass making
- Used in electronics and paint industries
Agriculture is a major economic activity employing a large percentage of the population:
diagramDescriptions: Map of FCT showing distribution of mineral resources
Chart showing major crops grown in each area council
Diagram of mining processes for marble and granite
Agricultural calendar showing planting and harvesting seasons
subUnits.youtubeQuery: Mineral resources and agriculture in FCT Abuja Nigeria site:youtube.com

quiz.q: Major mineral resources found in FCT include:
quiz.explanation: FCT is endowed with marble, clay, granite, gold, limestone, and other minerals, but not crude oil.

quiz.q: Kwali area council is famous for:
quiz.explanation: Kwali is renowned for traditional pottery and ceramic products made from abundant clay deposits.

quiz.q: The most common food crops grown in FCT are:
quiz.explanation: Major food crops include maize, sorghum, millet, yam, cassava, and various vegetables.

quiz.q: Marble deposits in FCT are mainly found in:
quiz.explanation: High-quality marble deposits are found in Kwali and Gwagwalada area councils.

quiz.q: The predominant farming system in FCT is:
quiz.explanation: Most farmers in FCT practice subsistence farming, though commercial farming is increasing.

quiz.q: Gold mining in FCT is found in:
quiz.explanation: Gold deposits are found in Abaji and Kuje areas, with artisanal mining activities ongoing.

quiz.q: Major cash crops grown in FCT include:
quiz.explanation: Cash crops include cotton, sesame seed, cashew, and shea nut, suitable for the savannah climate.

quiz.q: Livestock production in FCT is dominated by:
quiz.explanation: Cattle rearing by Fulani pastoralists is the dominant livestock activity, along with poultry and small ruminants.

quiz.q: A major challenge facing agriculture in FCT is:
opts: Limited access to credit and modern equipment
quiz.explanation: Challenges include limited credit, inadequate equipment, poor storage, pests, and urban encroachment.

quiz.q: Granite from FCT is mainly used for:
quiz.explanation: Granite is widely used for construction, road building, and decorative purposes, with export potential.

subUnits.title: 4.2 Industries and Commercial Activities in FCT
notes: FCT has a growing industrial sector contributing to economic development:
FCT is a major commercial hub due to its status as the nation's capital:
• Limited access to credit for SMEs
diagramDescriptions: Map of FCT showing major industrial areas and commercial centers
Chart showing types of industries in FCT
Diagram of commercial activities flow in FCT
Photograph collage of major markets and industrial facilities
subUnits.youtubeQuery: Industries and commercial activities in FCT Abuja Nigeria site:youtube.com

quiz.q: Major cement production in FCT is located in:
quiz.explanation: Dangote Cement has a major plant in Gwagwalada, utilizing limestone deposits from FCT.

quiz.q: The largest market in FCT is:
quiz.explanation: Wuse Market is the largest and most prominent market in FCT, serving as a major commercial hub.

quiz.q: Major industrial area in FCT is located in:
quiz.explanation: Idu Industrial Area is one of the major industrial zones in FCT, along with Gwagwalada and Bwari.

quiz.q: The hospitality industry in FCT is driven by:
quiz.explanation: FCT's hospitality sector thrives due to government activities, conferences, and its status as the capital.

quiz.q: Major commercial activities in FCT include:
quiz.explanation: FCT has diverse commercial activities including trade, banking, hospitality, real estate, and services.

quiz.q: The construction industry in FCT is important because:
opts: It employs many people and develops infrastructure
quiz.explanation: Construction is a major employer and drives infrastructure development in the rapidly growing FCT.

quiz.q: Financial services in FCT include:
quiz.explanation: FCT has comprehensive financial services including commercial banks, insurance, microfinance, and other financial institutions.

quiz.q: Small and Medium Enterprises (SMEs) in FCT engage in:
quiz.explanation: SMEs in FCT are involved in diverse activities including tailoring, catering, repairs, crafts, and petty trading.

quiz.q: A major challenge facing commerce in FCT is:
opts: High cost of living and traffic congestion
quiz.explanation: Challenges include high cost of living, traffic congestion, unemployment, and limited access to credit.

quiz.q: Real estate activities in FCT are driven by:
quiz.explanation: Real estate thrives due to rapid urbanization, population growth, and demand for residential and commercial properties.
